nasb.text: Pilate said to them, “You have a guard; go, make it as secure as you know how.”

esv.text: Pilate said to them, “You have a guard of soldiers. Go, make it as secure as you can.”

cnv.text: 彼拉多對他們說：“你們帶著衛兵，盡你們所能的去嚴密看守吧。”

ccb.text: 彼拉多说：“你们带上卫兵，去那里严加看守。”

csbs.text: 彼拉多对他们说：“你们有一队卫兵，尽你们所能，严密看守吧！”
